description: Deliberately ambiguous one-line message that should trigger the AI's review_request — the active learning loop's entrypoint. Exercises the AI's self-rated confidence threshold (set to <0.75 in BASE_PROMPT) and the review_request shape. Uses the new expected.review_request scoring rule (max_confidence + context_in) introduced alongside this case.

input.message: Is it ok to take this with that other thing my doctor mentioned?
